message:
fix(core): add defensive guards against division-by-zero, overflow, and release-mode panics

Guard 5 modules against runtime panics:
- error_clustering: assert num_bands > 0 before modulo in BandIndex::new
- bloom_filter: debug_assert bit array size m > 0 before modulo in hash_indices
- bayesian_ledger: guard division by zero in Dirichlet log-prior recomputation
- vector_index: promote debug_assert_eq to assert_eq in dot_product (prevents mismatched-length panic in release builds)
- orphan_reaper: use checked arithmetic in parse_etime to prevent u64 overflow on malicious/corrupt etime strings

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
